summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gab44 Astrology AI Coaching Platform. Backend APIs mostly functional (91.7% success rate), frontend UI working well with successful user flows. One critical backend issue identified with birth chart endpoint.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization error
critical_bugs.error_details: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]

integration_issues.issue: Birth chart page loads but may show errors due to backend API failure
integration_issues.note: Frontend handles the error gracefully and still displays chart elements

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, features, pricing, testimonials, FAQ
Navigation links work (Features, Testimonials, Pricing, FAQ scroll)
Sun sign calculator works with date input (correctly calculated Gemini for 1990-06-15)
User registration flow with birth details works perfectly
Dashboard displays after login with daily guidance, sun sign card, quick stats, upcoming transits
Transits page shows upcoming transit forecasts with filters
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
Chat functionality API works (send message, get history, get sessions)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical birth chart API endpoint (/api/chart/me) - MongoDB ObjectId serialization error. The issue is in the FastAPI response serialization where ObjectId fields from MongoDB are not JSON serializable. Need to either exclude _id fields or convert ObjectId to string before returning.
